# Royal King Seeds Australia

> Royal King Seeds is Australia's trusted online cannabis seed bank offering 1,200+ feminised, autoflower, CBD, and high-THC strains with discreet shipping across all Australian states and territories. 92% germination guarantee.

For a more detailed version of this file, see: https://royalkingseeds.au/llms-full.txt

## Key Information

- Online-only seed bank (no physical storefront)
- Ships domestically via Australia Post — discreet packaging
- Payment: Visa, Mastercard, cryptocurrency
- Germination guarantee on all orders
- Currency: AUD (Australian Dollars)
- Support: support@royalkingseeds.au

## Product Categories

- [All Cannabis Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/shop-all-cannabis-seeds): Full catalogue of 1,200+ strains
- [Feminised Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/feminized-seeds): 99.9% female plants, photoperiod
- [Autoflower Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/autoflowering-seeds): 8-10 week seed-to-harvest, beginner-friendly
- [Indica Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/indica-seeds): Relaxing body effects, compact plants
- [Sativa Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/sativa-seeds): Energising cerebral effects, taller plants
- [Hybrid Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/hybrid): Balanced indica/sativa genetics
- [CBD Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/cbd-strains): High-CBD, low-THC therapeutic strains
- [High THC Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/high-tch-seeds): 20%+ THC potent strains
- [Mix Packs](https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/mix-packs): Multi-strain variety bundles

## Location Pages

- [Buy Cannabis Seeds in Australia](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia): Hub page with all states and territories
- [New South Wales](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/new-south-wales): Temperate to subtropical growing
- [Victoria](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/victoria): Cool temperate climate
- [Queensland](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/queensland): Subtropical to tropical growing
- [Western Australia](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/western-australia): Mediterranean to arid climate
- [South Australia](https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/south-australia): Mediterranean climate growing

## Growing Guides

- [Autoflower Growing Guide](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/autoflower-cannabis-seeds-and-growing-guide): Complete guide to autoflowering genetics
- [Cannabis Nutrient Guide](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-nutrient-deficiencies): Macro/micronutrient function and deficiency diagnosis
- [Germination Guide](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/autoflowering-seed-germination-guide): Paper towel method step-by-step
- [Grow Light Guide](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-growing-lights-and-phases): LED vs HPS, PAR targets, light schedules
- [Pest Management](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-pest-management): IPM approaches for Australian growers
- [VPD and Humidity Control](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/vpd-and-humidity-control-in-cannabis-cultivation): Temperature-humidity interaction
- [Trichome and Harvest Guide](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-trichomes-and-harvesting): When to harvest for peak potency
- [Pruning and Training](https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-plant-pruning-and-topping): Topping, LST, SCROG techniques
